# Close Account

To close your Acme Shop account, log in and go to "Account Settings," then select the "Close Account" option and follow the prompts. Be aware that closing your account will permanently delete your purchase history and personal information, and this action cannot be reversed. Ensure all orders are complete and that any gift card balances are used, as they will be lost upon closure. The process typically takes up to 48 hours, and account closure is free of charge, but any subscription services must be canceled separately to avoid fees. For assistance with specific circumstances or concerns, you can contact customer support.
